important.snippet: Good afternoon, Nanci: Brie Horseman, the Mscapes Vice President of Design, provided me your email address and updated me on the NOAH certification process. As you are probably acutely aware, the past six month has been a time of uncertainty in off shore tariffs. As this process is now coming into a clearer focus, our offshore production plans are also becoming more focused. From your first correspondence with Brie Horseman and Harshad Chandrak, we were producing a unit in India and shipping the full unit to the USA. We continue to look at that process but also have a project in the works to use an "assembly" operation in the USA, using parts coming in from both India and Europe for final assembly in the USA and placement on a trailer in the USA. I would like to have a conversation with you about how we can accomplish this process. One option we are exploring is shipping units ready to place on a trailer with all MEP installed offshore. important.snippet: Hi Harshad, I came across your work in the Construction space in Mumbai and thought to reach out. I am Project Manager at MHXP (My Home Experience). We collaborate with companies in the Construction sector to bring their real estate projects to life before construction begins. Our platform turns CAD plans into real-scale 3D digital twins. Companies like Saharsh and their clients can see every detail, refine designs early, and make confident decisions. This reduces rework, avoids delays, and keeps projects on track. Each unit becomes an immersive virtual model, so buyers can quickly view layouts, finishes, and customization options. The models work on VR, mobile, tablet, and web, making the experience easy and engaging for everyone. We have delivered 29 projects for 17 builders, including Godrej Properties, Embassy Group, Sanjeevini Group, DLF, and ATMOS, combining design precision with a realistic, ergonomic experience for teams and clients. I’d love to discuss this in a 10-15 min call

Dear Harshad,

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Albert, and I am the Sales Manager at our company, which has been specializing in high-quality garden structures since 2020 in China. We offer a diverse range of products, including garden gazebos, pole tents, garden arches, pergolas, pavilions, and sun sails, all at competitive prices.

I believe there is a great opportunity for us to collaborate, and I would love to explore how we can work together. If you are interested, I would be happy to send you our e-catalogues so you can see our full range of offerings.

For more details and to view other exciting products, please feel free to visit our website. I look forward to your response and hope to establish a fruitful partnership soon.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,

Albert
Sales Manager
